claims.subject: ramA
claims.evidence_span: increased transcription of ramA is associated with tigecycline resistance

claims.subject: rarA
claims.evidence_span: overexpression of rarA results in a multidrug resistance phenotype

claims.subject: rarA
claims.evidence_span: requires a functional AcrAB efflux pump

claims.subject: rarA
claims.evidence_span: rarA overexpression upregulates the oqxAB efflux pump

claims.subject: oqxR
claims.evidence_span: oqxR ... is able to downregulate the expression of the oqxAB efflux pump

claims.subject: oqxR
claims.evidence_span: OqxR complementation resulted in reductions to olaquindox MICs
